articles.title: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
articles.summary: Rangers' Scottish Premiership title challenge has been undone by two damaging defeats by Motherwell and Hearts. What now for Danny Rohl and his players?

articles.title: Forest hopeful of Gibbs-White fitness for Europa tie
articles.summary: Morgan-Gibbs White might need a "miracle" to be ready for Nottingham Forest's Europa League semi-final second leg - but his head coach Vitor Pereira is hopeful.

articles.title: Why Premier League title is Arsenal's to lose after Man City slip
articles.summary: Mark Chapman, Charlie Adam, Shay Given and Rory Smith discuss Manchester City’s 3-3 draw at Everton, focusing on how dropped points could impact their Premier League title challenge.

articles.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

articles.title: A remarkable finale - but will 13 chaotic minutes cost Man City title?
articles.summary: A chaotic 13-minute spell from Man City in the second half of a six-goal thriller at Everton could prove to be the visitors' undoing in the Premier League title race.

articles.title: What Champions League failure means for 'broken club' Chelsea
articles.summary: After a sixth-straight league loss, Chelsea are almost certain to miss out on Champions League qualification - a bitter blow which is likely to have far‑reaching consequences.

articles.summary: Nottingham Forest increase their hopes of Premier League survival after a 3-1 win over Chelsea at Stamford Bridge, as goals from Taiwo Awoniyi and Igor Jesus help the visitors open a six-point gap ove...

articles.title: Doku scored 'really top goals' in 'really good game' - Guardiola
articles.summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says Jeremy Doku scored two "really, really top goals" in their six-goal thriller against Everton, as they lose ground on Arsenal in the Premier League title race...

articles.title: Moyes disappointed to only take point against Man City
articles.summary: EEverton boss David Moyes says he is "really disappointed" to come away with one point after Jeremy Doku scored a late equaliser for Manchester City in a 3-3 draw in the Premir League.

articles.title: Late double from West Ham stuns Villa
articles.summary: West Ham clinch a 2-0 victory over Aston Villa in the Women's Super League after Riko Ueki scores in the 85th minute before substitute Seraina Piubel secures the win six minutes later.

articles.title: We changed the players but kept the spirit - Pereira
articles.summary: Nottingham Forest manager Vitor Pereira says his side is "special" after beating Chelsea 3-1 and boosting their hopes of survival in the Premier League.

articles.title: Has 'diamond' Shankland delivered his biggest moment for Hearts?
articles.summary: Lawrence Shankland is hailed as a "diamond of a player" after his superb winning goal against Rangers moved Hearts a step closer to a historic league title.

articles.summary: Trai Hume says he has enjoyed a "whirlwind" rise in football after establishing himself for Sunderland and Northern Ireland.

articles.title: Wu wins World Snooker Championship after final-frame epic with Murphy
articles.summary: Wu Yize beat Shaun Murphy 18-17 to win the World Snooker Championship after an epic finale at the Crucible that came down to a final-frame decider.
